case_title: RAYMOND GLICKMAN VS. GINO ANGELO PABLO

docket_entries.description: RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO PLAINTIFF; UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-26-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLICKMAN, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT PABLO, GINO ANGELO
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,057.67 FILED BY GLICKMAN, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT PABLO, GINO ANGELO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-13-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PABLO, GINO ANGELO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLICKMAN, RAYMOND IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PABLO, GINO ANGELO THE DEFENDANT HAD PERMISSION TO USE PLAINTIFF'S DRIVEWAY TO MAKE A DELIVERY. PLAINTIFF VIOLATED CALIFORNIA VEHICLE CODE SECTIONS 21804(A) AND 22106. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
